1x1.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the top and right edges.

1x2.description: A tee shape with cables exiting left, right, and bottom edges.

1x3.description: A straight cable runs horizontally, connecting the left and right edges.

2x1.description: A vertical cable connects the top and bottom edges.

2x2.description: A tee-shaped cable exits the tile on the top, bottom, and right edges.

2x3.description: A T-shaped cable connects to left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: A tee shape with cable exiting left, right, and top edges.

3x2.description: An elbow-shaped cable connects the top and right edges.

3x3.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the top and right edges.
